intent: 2BR / 2 baths clustered + mid-band HALL — same lot as the no-hall sibling (13x12.5). The hall fits in the bath-block middle band so the shell doesn't need to grow. Bedrooms (master + standard) and the common bath all open onto the hall; hall has an open mouth into the great_room.
must_haves: clustered baths (ensuite + common share a plumbing wall)
private-wing hallway serving master, standard, and common bath
